ideas.title: pixel doodle
ideas.description: small grid; tap to color cells; palette of 6. clear button. no save.

ideas.title: color palette
ideas.description: tap to generate a 4-swatch harmonious palette. shows hex codes.

ideas.title: string art
ideas.description: circle of N evenly spaced points; connect with a fixed jump; slider changes N and the jump. produces star polygons.

ideas.title: haiku composer
ideas.description: three columns of pre-written 5/7/5 lines; tap a line to swap it for a new random one. produces semi-coherent haikus.

ideas.title: blob shaper
ideas.description: an organic blob with N control points; drag a slider to morph between three preset shapes via smooth interpolation.

ideas.title: type playground
ideas.description: type into a big field; sliders change size, tracking, weight, line-height. show the live preview.
